description_long: This object appears to be a highly distorted and abstracted representation of an adult pedestrian, with elongated and warped limbs and body parts. The head is somewhat recognizable as human, but the rest of the form is stretched and twisted, with the torso and legs merging into irregular, ribbon-like shapes. The surface texture is smooth and the colors are muted, with a mix of pale skin tones, gray, and black. The object lacks clear anatomical features such as hands or feet, and the proportions are highly unrealistic. There are no visible accessories or clothing details, and the overall form is surreal and non-functional as a human figure. The structure appears hollow in places, with thin, stretched surfaces.
description: A surreal, distorted adult human figure with elongated, twisted limbs and a vaguely human head, rendered in smooth, muted tones.
description_view_0: The front view shows the most recognizable human face, with the body and limbs stretched and twisted below.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the extreme elongation of the head and limbs, with the body appearing almost flat and ribbon-like.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the head and the twisted, merging limbs, with little anatomical detail.
description_view_3: The opposite side view highlights the stretched head and the irregular, looping lower limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: formless bodysuit or abstract garment with no discernible style or features
attribute_posture: contorted and elongated, with limbs and torso twisted in unnatural positions
